head.title: Agriturismo Segarelli | Holiday in Tuscany
head.description: Experience the Tuscan countryside at Agriturismo Segarelli: nature, cozy apartments, authentic food, and nearby medieval villages.
head.keywords: Tuscany agriturismo, relaxing stay Tuscany, countryside vacation, agriturismo with pool, medieval villages Tuscany, authentic Tuscany experiences, eco-friendly agriturismo

organization.name: Agriturismo Segarelli
organization.description: Agriturismo Segarelli is a Tuscan countryside retreat offering nature, peaceful spaces, cozy apartments, authentic cuisine, and experiences in medieval villages and scenic trails.

home.title: Reconnect with the joy of slowing down
home.description: There is a place in the Tuscan countryside where the pace slows down and everything becomes simpler. At Agriturismo Segarelli, you will find nature, peaceful spaces, and a warm, genuine welcome, full of sharing and care. A place to feel good, take your time, and enjoy everything around you

slides.title: Sleep
slides.text: Spacious, quiet, and welcoming spaces. Three apartments, some connected, so you can truly feel at home: Acacia, Edera, and Gelsomino.

slides.title: Eat
slides.text: An authentic, natural, and unpretentious experience.

slides.title: Play
slides.text: Walk, explore, relax: every corner has its surprises.

slides.title: Discover
slides.text: Explore medieval villages and enjoy local events.

title.title2: Through Hills, Valleys and The Sea

activities.description: The guests can visit many medieval villages, some of which are visible in the distance: Micciano, Libbiano, Pomarance, Montecastelli and Radicondoli. Here throughout the summer, almost every Sunday, it takes place local festivals that are always accompanied by a tasting of local products. Also during the spring-summer-autumn  excursions, trekking and other activities are organized
